issues.sample: Sunroof leaked. Not directly safety, but can be as water was getting on interior electronics. Dealer referenced TSB 2056944/10 and warranty extension U63  Sunroof WrtyExt 7yr/80k, but noted that we were not included in the warranty extension.

narrative.headline: What 2020 Audi E-Tron owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
